intro: Trigonochilum fractum, also known as the 'Fragrant Sedge', is a type of plant belonging to the Cyperaceae family, characterized by its distinctive, fragrant foliage and underground rhizomes. The plant has been reported to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Trigonochilum fractum's bioactive constituents include sesquiterpenes, phenolic compounds, and flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
